title: helianthemum inaguae
intro: Helianthemum inaguae, also known as the Jamaican pink rockrose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helianthemum inaguae include the potential treatment of various conditions, such as wounds, skin irritations, and infections, due to its antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
